message:
In Portugal, and we work with clients internationally. Our studio approach is very hands-on, so even when the project is abroad, the curation and detailing stay personal.

To guide you best, what kind of space are you designing, and where is it located?
I'm looking to buy a console for my friends

How lovely, a console is such a beautiful, social piece. For your friends, is this for a living room entry, a dining area, or more of a hallway statement?

Once I understand the space, I can suggest a few sculptural options that feel timeless yet unmistakably expressive.

Perfect, a dining console is where style becomes functional, it frames the room beautifully.

To curate the right direction, what atmosphere are you after, more warm and organic or more bold and architectural?
I want a warm vibe to make me feel at home

Warm and at home, I love that. In dining spaces, we usually lean into sculptural silhouettes with rich finishes, soft tactility, and materials that read inviting rather than imposing.

Would you prefer wood tones, like walnut or oak, or something with a warmer stone or lacquer presence?

Beautiful choice. Walnut or oak tones can make a dining area feel instantly grounded and welcoming, especially with consoles that have gentle curves or artful detailing.

To narrow it perfectly, what size are you working with, roughly the console length you have in mind?

Understood, a generous console will anchor the dining area in a truly welcoming way.

If you share the approximate length available, I can tailor a short list of warm wood-tone consoles that scale beautifully, including options that look refined even from close up. What maximum length can you accommodate?
from 1 meter width to 4 meters width

That range is wonderful, it gives us room to create a statement without losing warmth.

To curate precisely, what is the approximate width you want to land on for your space, and do you have a preferred height, around dining-console typical (about 80 to 90 cm) or something lower?

Wonderful, 80 to 90 cm gives a very elegant proportion for dining.

If you would like, I can prepare a tailored selection in warm wood tones for about 1 to 4 meters. Before I do, what is the best email to send the options to?
my names is jonas, the email is jonas@gmail.com

Jonas, thank you. I have your email as jonas@gmail.com.

To make sure the selection feels truly “at home,” what finish direction do you prefer within wood tones: a darker walnut richness or a lighter oak warmth?
